specializations: Silicone elastomers for cushion skin feel
product_highlights: DOWSIL™ silicones — comprehensive range of film formers and sensory enhancers
XIAMETER® silicones — high-performance, cost-effective silicone solutions
Specialty silicone elastomers — cushiony skin feel and improved spreadability
Naturally derived silicone alternatives for sustainable formulations
notes: Dow is one of the world's largest materials science companies with a comprehensive portfolio of silicone-based ingredients for personal care. Their DOWSIL™ and XIAMETER® silicone ranges include film formers, sensory modifiers, and emollients that are used in virtually every category of personal care product. Dow's silicone elastomers are particularly valued for their ability to deliver a unique, cushiony skin feel and improve the spreadability of formulations, making them indispensable in premium skincare and color cosmetics.
